positive: A vibrant, stylized geometric illustration featuring a mystical forest scene. The main subject is a pair of stylized, minimalist wolves howling at a luminous, full moon. The forest elements, including twisting branches, large stylized leaves, and ancient roots, are depicted using contrasting color blocks (deep indigo, emerald green, and metallic gold accents). The composition must be perfectly centered and highly symmetrical, creating a strong, clean silhouette effect suitable for a circular or square apparel print. Use a flat graphic design style reminiscent of Art Deco meets modern psychedelic illustration. High contrast, crisp linework, pop-art color saturation, studio lighting, vector art quality, no photorealism, perfect symmetry.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, blurry, noisy, grayscale, watermark, signature, text, logo, low resolution, bad anatomy, artifacts, extra limbs, distorted
